title: About The Last Subaltern
body:
The Last Subaltern is a journal of ideas, criticism, and historical inquiry. Founded in 2022, it publishes long-form essays, dispatches, and reviews for serious readers who believe the life of the mind requires unhurried attention.

In an age of algorithmic velocity, we offer measured cadence, rigorous argument, and the quiet pleasure of enduring prose. Our writers are critics, historians, and theorists who refuse the binary of optimism and despair.

The name draws from the Gramscian tradition — the subaltern as the voice excluded from official history, speaking from the margins of power. We believe every age has its subalterns, and every age needs writers willing to name them.
